title: Everyone's Friend
content:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Nobody's enemy save his ownן¿½,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ (What shall it be in the end?),
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Still by the nick-name he is known,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Everyoneן¿½s Friend.ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Nobodyן¿½s Enemyן¿½ stands alone
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ While he has money to lend,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Nobodyן¿½s Enemyן¿½ holds his own,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Everyoneן¿½s Friendן¿½

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Nobodyן¿½s Enemyן¿½ down and out,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Game to the end,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ And he mostly dies with no one about,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Everyoneן¿½s Friend.ן¿½
meaning:
"Everyone's Friend" is a quintessential example of Henry Lawson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
